description: Yesterday I played a very messy game which I probably should have lost but won due to my opponent's mistakes. Anyway, messy games make for good problems, so here I am. Unfortunately, I could only come up with two uncool simple yet tricky endgame style problems. This is the first.
sgf:

(;W[ks];B[ls]
